summary: A small rectangular single-story building with a stepped dark-red pitched roof sitting on a raised stonebrick foundation. Walls are horizontal planks with vertical log corner posts, a continuous band of windows along the long sides, and a stonebrick (stone slab/stonebrick) trim around the top of the walls and base perimeter.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with centered rectangular roof; raised perimeter platform

elements: continuous row of 4 glass windows on each long side
vertical log corner posts at each corner
raised stonebrick perimeter platform (one block higher than surrounding ground)
stepped dark roof with stone slab accents at outer steps
wood plank walls one block high above foundation with stone trim at top
rebuild_hints: Start with a rectangular stonebrick perimeter platform ~1 block high and 1 block wide around the building footprint.
Build wood plank walls inset one block from the stone perimeter and place vertical log blocks at each corner, aligning with the stone trim height.
Place a continuous row of glass panes (or glass blocks) along the long sides centered between foundation and top trim (four windows per side visible).

Add a stonebrick (or stone slab) top trim one block above the plank wall, then construct a centered rectangular stepped roof of dark nether-brick stairs/blocks forming a low gable with stone slab accents at each step.
Roof ridge is centered along the long axis; roof slopes are short (few steps) creating a rounded stepped profile rather than high peak.
uncertainties: Exact block types for top trim and foundation: appears to be stonebrick or stone slab; some accents may be slabs rather than full blocks.
Precise internal floor plan and presence/position of entrance: no door is visible in provided views; entrance location is uncertain.
Exact dimensions: counted visually from images; width/depth/height are approximate integer estimates and may be off by a few blocks.
